title: Ford’s $30,000 electric truck: all the news about the company’s big EV re-do
summary: But Ford still sees EVs as the future — just not oversize ones with “no path to profitability,” like the Lightning, as Andrew Frick, president of Ford Model e and Ford Blue, said last year.
